km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene於大約1415年出生在英國。他和Anna至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1445年在他的家鄉享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene于大约1415年出生在英国。他和Anna至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1445年在他的家乡享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kinne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from the female personal name Kinne, a Silesian pet form of Middle High German Kunigunde, composed of the Old High German elements kuoni ‘brave’ + gund ‘battle’.
Flemish: variant of   Kin   2 and 3.

variants.name: Kin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Sang, Young, Chong, Chun, Hak, Kwang, Song, Tae Wan, Yong, Yung, Aeja, Chin, Chul, Dong Joo, Dongil, Doo, Eng, Hee Chul, Hyeok, Hyung Joon, In-Young, Jong Woo, Min, Moon.
Polish: unexplained.
Dutch and Flemish: nickname for someone with a pointed or jutting chin, from Middle Dutch kinne ‘chin’.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Imre, Istvan, Janos, Sandor, Tibor.
Hungarian and Slovak: from a short form of the personal name Hungarian Benedek, Slovak Benedikt (see Benedict ).

Italian: from the personal name Bene, an omen or well-wishing name meaning ‘well, good’, or a short form of various compound omen or well-wishing names beginning with this element, such as Benvenuto ‘welcome’ and Benenato ‘well born’.

variants.name: Beni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Henri.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Bene  .
French: from beni ‘blessed’, the past participle of bénir ‘to bless’ (from Latin benedicere), presumably applied as a nickname, possibly with Christian overtones.

variants.name: Benassi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Geno, Carlo, Carmello, Dante, Marco, Paolo, Primo.
Italian: probably a variant of Benazzi, a derivative of the personal name Bene .

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Benanti
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Antonio, Carmelo, Salvatore.
Italian: from a derivative of the personal name   Bene  .

nameMeanings.name: Curtis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages as a nickname for someone who was ‘courteous’ (Old French curteis). At an early date, however, it came to be associated with Middle English curt ‘short’ + hose ‘leggings’ compare Courtney .

variants.name: Kurtis
meanings: Respelling of   Curtis  , influenced by   Kurt  , to which, however, it is not related.

en.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene was born about 1415, in England. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Anna. He died in 1445, in his hometown, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene est né environ 1415, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Anna. Il est décédé en 1445, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene wurde um 1415 in England geboren. Er hatte mit Anna mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1445 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene è nato il circa 1415 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Anna. Morì nel 1445, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Keneは約1415年にイギリスで生まれた。彼はAnnaとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1445年に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene(은)는 대략 1415년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 Anna(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Anna. Ele faleceu em 1445, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene родился около 1415 г. в местности Англия. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Anna. Он умер в 1445 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Curtis Kinne  De Kene nació aproximadamente 1415, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Anna. Murió en 1445, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años.

th.about 1415–1445: ประมาณปี 1415–ปี 1445
th.1415–Female: ปี1415–ถึงแก่กรรม
th.–Female: ถึงแก่กรรม
